description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:unstable Docker image with a before_script that runs apt update, installs cppcheck, valgrind, ninja-build, python3, git, gcc, g++, libgtest-dev, libboost-regex-dev, google-mock, python3-pip, and then installs meson via pip3 --user. Define a build stage with a build job that creates a build directory, runs `python3 ~/.local/bin/meson build && ninja -C build all`, and stores the resulting build/ directory as an artifact. Add a test stage with a test job that depends on the build job, copies `data/colorlog.conf` to `/etc/`, executes `ninja -C build cppcheckAll`, runs `ninja -C build test` falling back to output `build/meson-logs/testlog.txt` and exit code 4 on failure, and runs `ninja -C build test-valgrind` similarly handling `testlog-valgrind.txt`. No caches, services, or deployment targets are defined, and jobs run on every pipeline execution.
